messages.content:
## There are **Two** leaderboards.
> 1. Solo Board
> 2. Crew Board

## Solo Board:
> 2 lives
> Time limit of 15 minutes.
> If you crash twice or run out of time, your score will reset. 
> If you reset, while having a higher point value than your PB, it will override it, and you will have your new PB.

**Solo - Certified**
> To get Certified in Solo, you must be within the top 0.1% of all scores, and it is capped at max to the top 150 players.

**Solo Ranks**
> Certified → 0.1%/Top 150
> Sanctioned (I, II, III) → 1% - 0.1%
> Ghost (I, II, III) → 5% - 1%
> Licensed (I, II, III) → 10% - 5%
> Marked (I, II, III) → 25% - 10% 
> Noticed (I, II, III) → 50% - 25% 
> Listed (I, II, III) → 100% - 50%

## Crew Board
> To enable crew: <#1340461953155600514>. 

**Everyone in the crew will have their own individual score, however you will share one timer.**

> 2 lives
> 15 minutes.
> If your crew crashes twice or you run out of time, your score will reset. If your score, before being reset, was higher than your PB, it will override it.

**Crew - Syndicate**
> Syndicate is the Crew version of Certified. This is limited to the top 0.1%, and capped to 50 Teams.

**Crew Ranks**
> Syndicate → 0.1%/Top 50
> Faction (I, II, III) → 10% - 0.1%
> Outlaw (I, II, III) → 50% - 10%
> Rogue (I, II, III) → 100% - 50%

## Point System Overview
> Points are gained through cutting up between traffic cars. There are bonuses given to the following:
> * **Realistic Traffic** = Speed Multiplier bonus
> * **Realistic physics** = Combo Bonus per car passed
> * **First Person Camera** = Combo Bonus per car passed.
> * **Aggro Multiplier** *increases* as you pass cars in *different lanes consecutively*. This multiplier will *decrease* if you keep passing cars in the *same lane consecutively*. In order to bring it back up again, you'll need to pass a car in a different lane.
